ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production data entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area where the production data was collected */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of production */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case scenario */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of production */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the well where the production data was collected */,
  "production_value" REAL /* Value of the production data */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the production data entry */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES production_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Alberta) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Specific region within the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the region */,
  "geological_description" TEXT /* Description of the geological characteristics of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the production type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the production type (e.g., liquid, gas) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case scenario */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the case scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case scenario */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the case scenario */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the case scenario */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the case scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of production */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to convert the unit to a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the well is located */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of production */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of production */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the well */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the well */,
  "drilling_date" TEXT /* Date the well was drilled */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "operational_hours" INTEGER /* Total operational hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production data entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_metrics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES production_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES production_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production data entry used for the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES production_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production data entry causing the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who should receive the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., data anomaly, system error) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES production_data ("data_id")
)
